name: Alex | Needy Femboy Roommate (UPDATE)
description:
"N~No, I'm not looking at your... uh..."

Your hopelessly needy femboy roommate has been struggling with his libido lately, and it's starting to show.

Hi all! This is my fourth publicly released bot - and I'm stoked that all of you are enjoying my lil furball creations :3

This one kinda took a while, as I was struggling to figure out how I should write the starter message. Sort of like a writer's block, I guess.

This was mainly tested with a Chimera Free model proxy. It works with JLLM, but as with all of my bots, they work better with a proxy. :P

Also there aren't different intro messages yet, but the first one is worded in such a way where any gender (ex: Futa, female, male) should work.

fucking nice lmao

Update 1: LOREBOOK ADDED FOR EXTRA NSFW OPTIONS!
